overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the Heywood district of Night City. The scene features futuristic architecture, neon signage including the 'Barely Illegal' club, NCPD police presence, and diverse pedestrians in a vibrant cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk under HEYWOOD district sign

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position
passing under the overhead HEYWOOD sign structure into covered walkway section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching a police officer standing by a blue sports car

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing guard next to a blue sports car with pink rims

entered.detail: large holographic car advertisement on building wall showing luxury vehicle
overhead street sign with HEYWOOD and directional arrows mounted on metal framework
futuristic police cruiser with NCPD markings and blue neon accents
sleek blue sports car with distinctive pink neon wheel rims parked at curb
tall multi-story buildings with glass facades and neon signage lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. A large Rayfield car advertisement dominates the left wall while an overhead HEYWOOD sign spans the street ahead. An NCPD police officer stands by a distinctive blue sports car with pink rims on the right. The character walks forward passing under the sign structure, entering a slightly more covered section of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with Barely Illegal nightclub frontage

events.description: pedestrian in gray outfit with red shoes walks closely past the camera from right to left
character passes the parked police car and continues along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking past the Barely Illegal club entrance while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket and red shoes walking briskly past the camera

entered.detail: large neon sign reading 'Barely Illegal' in cursive orange lettering above club entrance
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glass enclosure
tall vertical screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the Barely Illegal nightclub with its prominent neon signage. The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A pedestrian in gray passes very close to the camera. The NCPD police car and blue sports car recede into the background as the character moves forward toward an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street approaching pedestrian overpass

events.description: increase in pedestrian density with multiple characters passing close by

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk through denser crowds of diverse pedestrians

entered.detail: multi-level parking garage with bright orange accent panels and open levels

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the overhead pedestrian bridge while walking through a moderately dense crowd. The Barely Illegal club and police vehicles are now behind, replaced by an orange parking structure on the right and various commercial storefronts. The overhead bridge looms closer as the character continues walking forward through the steady stream of pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant urban corridor in Heywood that shifts from a wide street view to a crowded pedestrian thoroughfare. It begins by following a character past a large Rayfield car advertisement and an NCPD officer stationed by a blue sports car, moving forward under a spanning HEYWOOD sign. As the character enters a more covered section of the walkway, the scene shifts past the neon signage of the Barely Illegal nightclub while pedestrians begin to crowd the sidewalk. The police vehicles then recede into the background as the camera pushes further into the city, passing an orange parking structure and various commercial storefronts. Finally, the movement culminates as the character navigates through a dense stream of people toward a looming overhead pedestrian bridge.
